title: Terms of Service
description: Please read these terms carefully before using Ansiversa and its services.

sections.title: Acceptance of Terms
paragraphs: By using Ansiversa, you agree to follow these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please discontinue use of the platform.

sections.title: About Ansiversa
paragraphs: Ansiversa is a platform that hosts multiple mini-apps. Features, interfaces, and availability may evolve over time as we improve the ecosystem.

sections.title: Accounts & Access
paragraphs: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and for providing accurate information. Unless otherwise permitted, each individual should use only one account.

sections.title: Acceptable Use
paragraphs: Ansiversa must not be used for illegal activity, abuse, harassment, or other harmful behavior. Do not attempt to disrupt, exploit, reverse engineer, or scrape the platform without permission.

sections.title: Content & Ownership
paragraphs: You retain ownership of the content you create or upload. Ansiversa may process content only to provide the services you request. Platform branding, UI, and systems belong to Ansiversa.

sections.title: Payments & Subscriptions
paragraphs: Some features may require payment in the future. Pricing, plans, and refund policies will be clearly communicated before purchase, and subscriptions (if offered) will follow the stated terms.

sections.title: Service Availability
paragraphs: Ansiversa is provided "as is." Downtime may occur for maintenance or updates, and uninterrupted access cannot be guaranteed.

sections.title: Termination
paragraphs: You may stop using the service at any time. We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms, doing so in a way that is fair and proportional to the issue.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
paragraphs: To the fullest extent allowed by applicable principles, Ansiversa is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages. You use the service at your own risk.

sections.title: Changes to Terms
paragraphs: These terms may be updated occasionally, and changes will be reflected on this page. Continuing to use Ansiversa after updates means you accept the latest version.

sections.title: Governing Principles
paragraphs: These terms are governed by applicable laws and principles. More detailed jurisdictional information will be added in future updates.

sections.title: Contact Information
paragraphs: Questions about these terms? Visit our Contact Us page. You can also reach us at legal@ansiversa.com when the dedicated inbox launches.
